first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning provided in both evaluations is substantively the same. Minor differences in wording, such as the ordering of phrases in the strengths section, are consistent with normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any change in the model's assessment of the candidate's qualifications. The model did not react to the change in work location from various international cities to the United States.
